name: mcp-builder-lite
description: Free starter for building Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers: the MCP Architect agent plus Scaffold MCP Server and Design an MCP Tool. Stand up a new server in TypeScript (@modelcontextprotocol/sdk) or Python (mcp / FastMCP) and design your first tool with a precise schema and a robust handler. Upgrade to Premium for resources, prompts, OAuth, MCP Inspector testing, a security review, and publishing.
